content:
Even if the survey translation quality is low, it would be nice to have an option to view it in English.
While I want to receive the survey reward, I expect many people will just answer randomly if they can't read the questions.
Currently, it's very inconvenient since you can't even drag and drop questions into a translator.
ingame survey dropped per mail today
Ouch, maybe screen reader ai tool most phones include nowadays would work? Or are those bannable somehow?
